data.body:
Gate has

title
description
edges
owner type
tags
invariants
failure modes (mapping of invariant violation to knots)
workflow is

ready to evaluate
evaluating
shipped
abandoned

the idea is that a gate is a yes or no

if it's a no, we have to find the knot based on the invariant violation, and mark it is "ready for planning", and add a note/handoff_capsule that the gate failure reopened it.
data.title: Add "Gate" knot type with basic schema and workflow
